_publications._publicationTitle: Neuronal hyperexcitability drives central and peripheral nervous system tumor progression in models of neurofibromatosis-1.

_contextSnippet: conditioned media (CM) from group 1, but from not group 2, NF1-mutant neurons increased preneoplastic shNF1 Schwann cell proliferation (3.4–3.6-fold increase in Ki67+ Schwann cells)
details: Successfully created NF1-deficient Schwann cells that showed increased proliferation (3.4-3.6-fold increase in Ki67+ cells) when treated with tumor-associated NF1-mutant neuron conditioned media
